subject: [PATCH v6 09/22] mm: swap: allocate a virtual swap slot for each swapped out page

2026-05-05.patch_summary: This patch introduces a new virtual swap slot design for each swapped out page in the Linux kernel. It dynamically allocates a virtual slot and associates it with a physical swap slot on a swapfile or partition. The virtual swap slot is stored in page table entries and used to index into swap data structures, replacing the old physical swap slot. This change also updates the freeing ordering of swap slots and repurposes the swap table infrastructure as a reverse map for looking up virtual swap slots from their associated physical swap slots.
